title: The Twelve Dancing Princesses
lines: A king had twelve daughters, and he guarded them carefully, locking them in a room every night.
But every morning he found that their shoes were worn through as if they had danced all night.
The king announced that any man who could discover where the princesses danced would have his choice of them as a wife.
Many tried and failed, losing their lives in the attempt.
One day a poor soldier came to the palace and offered to solve the mystery.
The oldest princess gave him a cup of wine that made him fall into deep sleep.
An old woman who was a friend to the princesses gave the soldier a cloak that made him invisible.
That night, following the invisible princesses, he discovered that a secret door led down to an underground palace.
There the princesses danced with twelve enchanted princes all through the night.
The soldier gathered proof of what he had seen and showed it to the king.
The king awarded the youngest princess to the soldier as a prize.
The spell was broken, and the princesses were freed from their enchantment.
The soldier and the youngest princess were married and lived happily ever after.
